description: Style Note Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish clutch bag from wills lifestyle. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Product Details Red handbag crafted from genuine leather Flap with a buckle closure and tassel design on the front for style One main zippered compartment with organizer sleeves to carry essentials Material and Care Leather Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Size  Dimensions : 29 cm x 15 cm
